response.justification: The candidate meets the raw experience bar with roughly 18 years of hands-on software development across web, embedded, and high-throughput systems, plus genuine entrepreneurial experience as a founder, but the trajectory is that of a strong senior/staff engineer rather than a director-level AI strategist. AI exposure is limited to recent MCP tooling and agent-infrastructure contributions, with no recognized AI expertise, no AI-related advanced degree, and no demonstrated AI products or platforms at scale, which are the core differentiators for this role.
strengths: 18+ years of broad engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and low-latency distributed systems
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform, showing entrepreneurial drive and product ownership
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or demonstrated AI products/platforms at the depth the role requires
Career history is senior/staff IC delivery work, not principal-level strategy or engineering leadership
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and limited evidence of advising executives or strategic customers

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs. director-level IC scope
Long, broad engineering experience with founder background
